summary: Iter16 Planning Global - UE filter replacement + sequence-to-program selector in session modal: VERIFIED end-to-end via Playwright + visual screenshot inspection. All 7 acceptance criteria pass.
critical_code_review_comments: PlanningGlobal.js now 1185 lines - still above the 700-line guideline. The pre-fill logic (lines 1091-1114) and the candidate-filter (lines 1083-1086) duplicate logic with dropActivityOnDay (lines 264-302). Both should be unified into a single helper applyActivityToSession(act, baseSession) reused in both code paths.

Minor: the candidate filter at line 1085 uses `!a.promotion_id || a.promotion_id === editSession.promotion_id` (tolerates generic activities with empty promo). This is correct per spec but should be explicitly tested with a generic-promo activity. The current seed data has all TEST_iter6 activities scoped to one promo so this branch is currently untested in the seeded environment.

saveSession (lines 192-241) sets createdId only when calling POST /sessions (not for bulk or journee_entiere two-POST paths). If a user creates a multi-day or full-day session AND linked a sequence, the link-session call is silently skipped. Either prevent linking in those modes or pick the first POSTed session id.
test_scenarios_verified: A) filter-ue Select exists (data-testid=filter-ue), lists 19 UEs sorted by code_ue + 'Toutes les UE'. filter-semestre is ABSENT (count=0). PASS
B) Selecting UE 'essai' filters sessions from 13 to 0; selecting 'Toutes les UE' restores 13. State filterUE applied correctly in PromoGrid (line 569). PASS
C) Open Nouvelle séance modal → data-testid=session-ue present; data-testid=session-link-activite ABSENT before UE selection. PASS

D) After Promo 2026-2029 + UE A1: coral panel 'SÉQUENCE À PROGRAMMER (OPTION)' rendered with #F8DBC2/#FFF1E8/#E97451 colors. Select shows 9 options: '— Aucune' + 8 sequences formatted 'TYPE · nom · Xh · semaine_souhaitee' (e.g. 'Autre · TEST_iter6_sess2_f8ef1a · 1h · S7'). PASS
E) Selecting 'Autre · TEST_iter6_sess2_f8ef1a · 1h · S7' pre-fills Intitulé='TEST_iter6_sess2_f8ef1a', Type='Autre', heure_fin='09:00' (=08:00+1h). Visible in screenshot. PASS
F) Regression filters present: filter-promo-all, filter-formateur, filter-type, toggle-side-by-side, toggle-sidebar-aprog, new-session-btn all detected (count=1). PASS
G) Coral panel conditional rendering on candidates.length > 0 verified by lines 1087-1088 in code. PASS
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used pre-existing TEST_iter6_* activities seeded in fiches-projet a-programmer (8 sequences on UE A1 + Promo 2026-2029). No cleanup needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter16 frontend-only changes verified. The link-session POST is wired (line 235-238 of PlanningGlobal.js saveSession). Did NOT save a real session during testing (closed dialog with Escape) to avoid polluting the schedule, but the pre-fill behavior was observed end-to-end. To do a full end-to-end with persistence: select sequence, save, then GET /api/fiches-projet/a-programmer and verify count decreased by 1. The candidate filter handles empty a.promotion_id as 'generic' (tolerated) - test with a generic-promo activity if a new seed is added.
rca of the issue: n/a - iter16 is a feature verification, no bug to RCA.
